'''竏嗜-ng-d''' ('''kanangad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ugg|ugg]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ugg|ugg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗜-ng-d
|-
! Lemma
| kanangad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinangad|thinangad]] || [[word:jinangad|jinangad]] || [[word:shinangad|shinangad]] || [[word:kinangad|kinangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunangad|thuthunangad]] || [[word:jujunangad|jujunangad]] || [[word:shushunangad|shushunangad]] || [[word:kukunangad|kukunangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunangad|thunangad]] || [[word:junangad|junangad]] || [[word:shunangad|shunangad]] || [[word:kunangad|kunangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunangad|thunangad]] || [[word:junangad|junangad]] || [[word:shunangad|shunangad]] || [[word:kunangad|kunangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenangad|thenangad]] || [[word:jenangad|jenangad]] || [[word:shenangad|shenangad]] || [[word:kenangad|kenangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonangad|thothonangad]] || [[word:jojonangad|jojonangad]] || [[word:shoshonangad|shoshonangad]] || [[word:kokonangad|kokonangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonangad|thonangad]] || [[word:jonangad|jonangad]] || [[word:shonangad|shonangad]] || [[word:konangad|konangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonangad|thonangad]] || [[word:jonangad|jonangad]] || [[word:shonangad|shonangad]] || [[word:konangad|konangad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]] || [[word:nangad|nangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦnangad|thﾃｦnangad]] || [[word:jﾃｦnangad|jﾃｦnangad]] || [[word:shﾃｦnangad|shﾃｦnangad]] || [[word:kﾃｦnangad|kﾃｦnangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanangad|thathanangad]] || [[word:jajanangad|jajanangad]] || [[word:shashanangad|shashanangad]] || [[word:kakanangad|kakanangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanangad|thanangad]] || [[word:janangad|janangad]] || [[word:shanangad|shanangad]] || [[word:kanangad|kanangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanangad|thanangad]] || [[word:janangad|janangad]] || [[word:shanangad|shanangad]] || [[word:kanangad|kanangad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanangad|shanangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanangad|goshanangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanangad|gokishanangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanangadnﾃｼ|shanangadnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanangadnknﾃｼ|goshanangadnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangadnﾃｼ|gokishanangadnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanangadshﾃｫ|shanangadshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanangadnkshﾃｫ|goshanangadnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanangadshﾃｫ|gokishanangadshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangadro|shanangadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangadnkro|goshanangadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangadro|gokishanangadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangadmu|shanangadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangadnkmu|goshanangadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangadmu|gokishanangadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanangadsher|shanangadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanangadnksher|goshanangadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanangadsher|gokishanangadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanangadng|shanangadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanangadnkng|goshanangadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanangadng|gokishanangadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanangadya|shanangadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanangadnkya|goshanangadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanangadya|gokishanangadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanangadyam|shanangadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanangadnkyam|goshanangadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanangadyam|gokishanangadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanangadnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shanangadnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanangadnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshanangadnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanangadnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishanangadnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangadnﾃｼro|shanangadnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangadnknﾃｼro|goshanangadnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangadnﾃｼro|gokishanangadnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangadnﾃｼmu|shanangadnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangadnknﾃｼmu|goshanangadnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangadnﾃｼmu|gokishanangadnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanangadshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shanangadshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanangadnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshanangadnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangadshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishanangadshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangadshﾃｫro|shanangadshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangadnkshﾃｫro|goshanangadnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangadshﾃｫro|gokishanangadshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangadshﾃｫmu|shanangadshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangadnkshﾃｫmu|goshanangadnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangadshﾃｫmu|gokishanangadshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanangadronﾃｼ|shanangadronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanangadnkronﾃｼ|goshanangadnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangadronﾃｼ|gokishanangadronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanangadroshﾃｫ|shanangadroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanangadnkroshﾃｫ|goshanangadnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanangadroshﾃｫ|gokishanangadroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanangadromu|shanangadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanangadnkromu|goshanangadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanangadromu|gokishanangadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanangadmunﾃｼ|shanangadmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanangadnkmunﾃｼ|goshanangadnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanangadmunﾃｼ|gokishanangadmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanangadmushﾃｫ|shanangadmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanangadnkmushﾃｫ|goshanangadnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanangadmushﾃｫ|gokishanangadmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanangadmuro|shanangadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanangadnkmuro|goshanangadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanangadmuro|gokishanangadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
